class.name: JustAMCPPromptExecutor
class.brief_description: Orchestrates and manages custom MCP Prompts dynamically inside the server pipeline.

method.name: add_prompt
method.description: Dynamically inserts a [JustAMCPPrompt] template node natively mapping iterative schema listings inside the MCP!

method.name: complete_prompt
method.description: Fetches auto-complete strings routing dynamic user parameter matches automatically! Returning the array bounds safely identifying mapping blocks.

method.name: get_prompt
method.description: Produces a fully mapped string of context resolving a named specific prompt instance.

method.name: list_prompts
method.description: Returns all currently active mapped [JustAMCPPrompt] schema values wrapped dynamically natively!
